description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a flat, smooth top surface and a warm brown finish. The right side features two vertically stacked drawers, each with a small round knob, providing storage space for office supplies or personal items. The left side is open beneath the desktop, allowing ample legroom for a seated user. The desk's construction appears sturdy, with solid side and back panels, and the wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a classic and professional appearance. The drawers are partially open in some views, revealing their boxy interiors. There are no visible decorative elements, making the design functional and utilitarian.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden desk with two drawers on the right and an open leg space on the left. The surface is smooth with a warm brown wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two drawers on the right and open leg space on the left.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the partially open lower drawer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the open left compartment.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the plain side panel with no drawers or openings.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the two drawers on the right and open leg space on the left, indicating the front of the desk. The solid panel is at the back.
